title: DSK Legal, AZB act on India leg of CMA CGM - Stonepeak joint venture
description: CMA CGM S.A., the world’s third-largest container shipping group, has entered into a strategic partnership with Stonepeak Partners LP, to form United Ports LLC, a Joint Venture to acquire 10 of the major CMA CGM-operated port terminals worldwide.Under the terms of the agreement, Stonepeak acquired a 25% minority stake in United Ports LLC for $2.4 billion. The deal further includes a commitment for up to $3.6 billion in additional investment.DSK Legal assisted and advised CMA CGM on the
